theme_and_identity.aesthetic_archetype: Electric & Neon meets Premium Glassmorphism (Apple + OpenAI + Stripe + Linear)
theme_and_identity.mood: Futuristic, premium, insightful, high-end startup, highly animated, authoritative
theme_and_identity.description: A world-class futuristic AI web application that visually tracks and predicts the impact of AI on users' careers. Features heavy glassmorphism, glowing particles, deep gradients, and fluid cinematic transitions.

typography.font_strategy: The Anti-Default Rule: Distinctive, premium, and layered hierarchy. NO Inter or Roboto for headings.

h1.classes: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
h1.description: For main landing page hero. Use text-transparent and bg-clip-text with a cyan to purple gradient.

h2.classes: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight
h2.description: Section headers and primary onboarding questions.

h3.description: Subsection headers and Dashboard component titles.

h4.description: Card headers and small widget titles.

overline_labels.description: Used for 'TOP AI FACTORS', 'RISK LEVEL' badges.

data_values.description: Used for Automation Probability %, trend chart axes, and numeric metrics.

colors.strategy: High-contrast Electric & Neon. Forbidden: #7351B7. Using Stark White for light mode and Deepest Void Black for dark mode, elevated by Neon Cyan, Deep Blue, and Electric Indigo.

glassmorphism.strategy: The 'Crystal' Variant (Apple-like). High blur, solid structural borders, subtle shadow.

tracing_beam.strategy: Animated glowing gradient lines around high-value active cards (like Top AI Factors or Final Result).
tracing_beam.implementation: Use Framer Motion to animate an SVG border path or use a moving mask-image with blur-md.

layouts_and_spacing.scale: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more padding than standard.

bento_grid.strategy: High Density Grid for the Result Dashboard. Strict grid hierarchy, precise usage of screen space.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), bold neon background (dark) or deep blue (light), with text-shadow for contrast, hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300.
buttons.secondary: Glass pill, border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 transition-all duration-300.

cards.default: Glassmorphic rounded-[24px] overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-500
cards.persona_cards: Interactive cards in Step 1. Require hover lift, glowing border on focus, and an internal icon.

inputs.search_autocomplete: Massive, immersive search bar. text-2xl. No borders, only a soft bottom glow. backdrop-blur-xl bg-transparent.
inputs.slider: Shadcn Slider customized with glowing primary track and a neon-shadowed thumb.

charts.styling: No grid lines or very subtle dashed lines. Smooth curves for line charts. Transparent backgrounds for pie/radar. Use Neon Cyan, Indigo, and Violet for chart series.

motion_and_interactions.cinematic_scanning: Step 4 animation. Full screen or large card container. A cyan laser line sweeps top-to-bottom using Framer Motion (y: [0, 100%]), leaving a trail of illuminated text. No standard loading spinners.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: AnimatePresence with Framer Motion. Elements fade in (opacity: 0 -> 1) and slide up (y: 20 -> 0) with a gentle spring stiffness (stiffness: 100, damping: 20).
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: Dashboard result cards MUST animate in sequentially. (staggerChildren: 0.1).

media_and_3d.galaxy_particles: Use 'tsparticles' or 'react-tsparticles' with a custom 'mesh/neural network' config: slow moving dots connected by thin lines, colored in cyan/purple.
media_and_3d.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with a consistent 1.5 stroke width. Use dual-tone styling if possible (e.g. SVG stroke vs fill).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio. Neon text on black must be checked. If text sits on a glowing element, add text-shadow.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in all Framer Motion configs.

fallback_backgrounds.description: Dark background with blue and purple glowing aura, excellent for dark mode background layer behind glassmorphism.

strict_rules: DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Utilize asymmetry and dynamic grids.
DO NOT use the default Vercel/Stripe card look. Heavily customize Shadcn components with the provided 'Crystal' Glassmorphism settings.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body.
NEVER use a fully transparent header; it must have a backdrop-blur.
DO NOT build a standard web form for onboarding. It must feel like an immersive, interactive app flow with animated step transitions.
When building Step 4 (AI Scanning), DO NOT use a spinner. You MUST use Framer Motion to create a scanning laser effect over text or a grid.
In the Dashboard, every chart and widget MUST sit on a glassmorphic surface with proper internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
implementation_steps: 1. Setup Tailwind config with exact colors and border radiuses provided in this JSON.
2. Setup React Router for the multi-step flow or manage state locally with Framer Motion AnimatePresence.
3. Implement the TSParticles background globally, ensuring it toggles colors/opacity based on dark/light mode.
4. Build the immersive landing page hero.
5. Build Onboarding Steps 1-4 with custom glassmorphic cards and slider inputs.
6. Build the Step 5 Bento Grid Dashboard using Recharts and pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structure.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
